allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total:',len\(d\)\); pc=[p['id'] for g in d for p in g['platforms'] if p['name']=='PC'][:1]; print\('PC id:', pc[0] if pc else 'none'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Xbox games:',len\(d\),'| titles:',[g['title'] for g in d]\)")
